touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Mason Kang at PeakIO. No answer, left voicemail introducing our onboarding automation platform and mentioning we help eCommerce companies reduce CS team workload.
Follow-up email to Mason after voicemail. Highlighted how similar eCommerce companies reduced onboarding time by 60%. Included case study link. No response received.

Third touchpoint email with personalized insight about PeakIO's recent growth to 285 employees and likely CS scaling challenges. Mason responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What specifically can you automate in the onboarding process?
questions_asked.answer: We automate account setup, integration configuration, email sequences, and progress tracking - essentially everything between contract signature and first successful login.

next_steps: Mason to check calendar availability for qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Email exchange confirming qualification call time. Mason shared that their CS team is currently handling 20+ onboardings manually per month and it's becoming a bottleneck.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: Most mid-market customers are live within 2-3 weeks depending on integration complexity.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday at 2pm PT

touches.ai_summary: Pre-call email with discovery agenda and requesting Mason invite relevant stakeholders. Mason confirmed he'll join solo initially but may bring implementation team later.
next_steps: Discovery call confirmed for tomorrow

touches.ai_summary: 30-minute discovery call with Mason. Discussed current onboarding pain points: manual data entry, inconsistent customer experience, CS team spending 40% of time on onboarding vs renewals. PeakIO onboards 20-25 new customers monthly. Mason is VP of CS and owns the budget, expressed strong interest in seeing demo. He mentioned Harper Miller (CRO) would need to sign off on any purchase.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and support ticketing system?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with most major CRMs and ticketing platforms. We'll confirm your specific stack during technical review.

questions_asked.question: What does pricing typically look like for a company our size?
questions_asked.answer: For mid-market companies handling 20-25 onboardings per month, we typically see packages in the $15-25K ACV range depending on seat count and automation tier.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for implementing a solution?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of Q2. Our current manual process is not sustainable with our growth trajectory.

next_steps: Send demo invite including implementation team
Mason to introduce Harper Miller via email

touches.ai_summary: Post-discovery follow-up with demo scheduling link and ROI calculator based on their 20-25 monthly onboardings. Mason confirmed demo for next week and cc'd Evelyn Tran and Leila Watanabe from implementation team.
next_steps: Demo scheduled for next Thursday with Mason, Evelyn, and Leila

touches.ai_summary: Pre-demo email with personalized demo agenda focusing on onboarding workflow automation, integration capabilities, and reporting. Confirmed attendees and sent calendar hold for Harper Miller as optional.

questions_asked.question: Will we be able to customize the onboarding workflows for different customer segments?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - you can create multiple workflow templates and trigger them based on customer attributes, plan tier, or custom fields.

next_steps: Demo confirmed for tomorrow 3pm PT

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email. Demo went well with Mason, Evelyn, and Leila (Harper joined for last 10 minutes). Team was impressed with automation capabilities and ease of customization. Evelyn asked about security compliance and Amanda Koch (IT Director) will need to review before purchase.

questions_asked.question: Do you have SOC 2 Type II certification?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we're SOC 2 Type II certified and can provide our security documentation for Amanda's review.

next_steps: Send security documentation to Amanda
Prepare proposal for 22 seats unlimited automation tier
Schedule proposal review call with Mason and Harper

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute proposal review call with Mason and Harper. Presented unlimited automation package for 22 seats at $18,700 ACV. Harper asked about implementation timeline and ongoing support. Mason confirmed this aligns with budget and they want to move forward pending Amanda's security review and final pricing confirmation.

questions_asked.question: What level of support is included at this tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automation tier includes priority email/chat support, dedicated implementation manager, and quarterly business reviews.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss payment terms - standard is annual upfront, but we offer quarterly or monthly options depending on the deal structure.

next_steps: Amanda to complete security review by end of week

Schedule final alignment call next week

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure quarterly payments. Typically adds a small processing fee, but we can work with you on the final terms.

questions_asked.question: When would the first payment be due?
questions_asked.answer: First payment due upon contract signature, then quarterly on the anniversary date.
